content.problemStatement:
Pesla needs to charge NNN cars before sending them to space. The ithi^{th}ith car has an energy capacity AiA_iAi​ Watt-hours.

There are MMM power outlets. The jthj^{th}jth outlet provides a power of BjB_jBj​ Watt.

If an outlet can charge **at most** one car and a car can be charged by **at most** one outlet, find the **maximum** total energy (in Watt-hours) stored in all cars after HHH hours.

Note:


A power outlet **cannot** charge a different car even after completely charging a car.
Energy is the product of power and time. For instance, a car can store 111 Watt-hour of energy if it is charged at a power station with 111 Watt power for 111 hour.

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contains 333 space-separated integers NNN, MMM, and HHH, the number of cars, the number of power outlets, and the number of hours respectively.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers, the energy capacities (in Watt-hour) of the NNN cars.
The third line of each test case contains MMM space-separated integers, the power (in Watt) of the MMM power outlets.


Output Format
For each test case, print the maximum total energy (in Watt-hours) stored in all cars after HHH hours.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10510^5105.
The sum of MMM over all test cases won't exceed 10510^5105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: We use the second power outlet to charge the car. After 222 hours, 40⋅2=8040\cdot2 = 8040⋅2=80 watt-hours of energy is stored in the car.
Test case 222: We use the power outlet to charge the second car. After 222 hours, 11⋅2=2211\cdot2 = 2211⋅2=22 watt-hours of energy is generated but since the car has the capacity of 202020, it will store only 202020 watt-hours of energy.
Test case 333: We use the first power outlet to charge the first car and second outlet to charge the second car. After 111 hour, the first car will store 303030 watt-hours of energy (due to its maximum capacity) and second car will store 202020 watt-hours of energy.
Thus, the cars will store a total of 505050 watt-hours of energy.
